heading: Short title
label: 485k Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Reclamation Project Act of 1939.”
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , which enacted this subchapter, sections 375a, 380a, and 387 to 389 of this title and section 16d of former Title 41, Public Contracts, and enacted provision set out as a note under . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 41853 Stat. 1187section 485j of this title

Short Title of 2013 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–24, § 1127 Stat. 498Aug. 9, 2013“This Act [amending ] may be cited as the ‘Bureau of Reclamation Small Conduit Hydropower Development and Rural Jobs Act’.”section 485h of this title
